name: Mild Vegetarian Enchilada with Carrot Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop all vegetables separately into small chunks.
2. Heat a skillet and coat with vegetable oil.
3. Add the chopped vegetables and spices to the skillet.
4. Cook for about 15 minutes, stirring often until the vegetables are cooked but still crunchy.
5. Separate 2 cups of Carrot Sauce for dipping tortillas.
6. Dip each tortilla into the sauce and place flat on a sheet pan.
7. Divide the enchilada filling among the six tortillas and roll them closed.
8. Spoon 3 ounces of Carrot Sauce over each enchilada.
9. Sprinkle with 1/2 ounce of shredded Monterey Jack cheese.
10. Reheat in an oven at 350 degrees for 5 minutes.
11. Makes 6 servings.
